text.title: Postmortem Action Item SLO Tracking Examples
text.summary: One worked example: ledger entry creation, weekly review digest, and overdue-flag handling.

example.description: P1 incident (Redis connection pool exhaustion) → ledger row creation → weekly review → overdue flag → re-prioritization.
example.code: { "owner": {"person": "ruslan", "role": "SRE lead"}, "review_cadence": "weekly", "retention_months": 24, "entries": [ { "id": 1, "ts": "2026-05-12T09:30:00Z", "owner": "ruslan", "hypothesis_or_event": "INC-441 prod 500s after Redis upgrade — pool exhausted", "evidence_link": "https://github.com/org/repo/issues/441", "outcome": "pending", "next": "Add max-connections alert at 80%", "slo_class": "P1", "slo_due": "2026-05-26" }, { "id": 2, "ts": "2026-05-26T10:00:00Z", "owner": "ruslan", "hypothesis_or_event": "Re-row of #1 — alert shipped", "evidence_link": "https://github.com/org/repo/pull/482", "outcome": "closed", "next": "none", "slo_class": "P1", "slo_due": "2026-05-26" } ] }

# Weekly Digest — 2026-05-22
- SLO compliance: 6/7 P1 items closed within 2 weeks (86%). - Overdue: 1 (entry #1 — Redis alert). Owner notified. - Archived this period: 0 (retention horizon 24 months).
